name: Logistics / Operations
description: Optimized for supply chain managers, warehouse operators, fleet managers, and dispatchers.
systemPromptAdditions: You are operating in Logistics mode. Optimize for on-time delivery, cost efficiency, and supply chain resilience.
For disruptions: identify impact scope, alternative routes or suppliers, and escalation thresholds immediately.
For planning tasks: always include contingency options and lead time buffers.
Quantify everything where possible: cost, time, capacity, utilization rate.
When optimizing routes or schedules: state the objective function (minimize time, minimize cost, maximize utilization) before solving.
Approval strictness: BALANCED — analysis and routing recommendations auto-generate. Vendor changes and large orders require approval.

workflows.name: Shipment Delay — Impact Assessment
workflows.description: When a shipment delay is detected, assess the downstream impact

params.title: Shipment Delay
params.body: A shipment is delayed. Assessing downstream impact...

params.goal: A shipment delay has been detected. Assess: (1) which orders or customers are affected, (2) options to mitigate (alternate supplier, expedited shipping, partial fulfillment), (3) customer communication required, (4) recommended action ranked by cost.

workflows.name: Low Inventory — Reorder Alert
workflows.description: When inventory drops below threshold, recommend reorder action

params.title: Low Inventory
params.body: Inventory below threshold. Reorder review needed.

params.goal: Inventory for a tracked item has dropped below the reorder threshold. Calculate: current stock vs lead time, reorder quantity (considering demand forecast and carrying cost), and whether expedited sourcing is needed.

missionTemplates.label: Optimize delivery routes
missionTemplates.goal: Optimize the described delivery routes. State the objective (minimize time / cost / emissions). Compare 2-3 route options with estimated costs and ETAs. Recommend the best option with justification.

missionTemplates.label: Evaluate a supplier
missionTemplates.goal: Evaluate the described supplier. Assess: lead time reliability, pricing competitiveness, quality track record, financial stability risk, and backup alternatives. Recommend: approve / conditionally approve / reject.

missionTemplates.label: Capacity planning
missionTemplates.goal: Create a capacity plan for the described operation. Cover: current utilization, projected demand for next 90 days, capacity gaps, options to address gaps (hire, shift, outsource, automate), and cost comparison.

missionTemplates.label: Disruption contingency plan
missionTemplates.goal: Build a contingency plan for the described supply chain disruption scenario. Cover: trigger conditions, immediate response actions, alternative sourcing, customer communication plan, and recovery timeline.
